S1.title: aiosqlite migration + full schema
S1.commit_message: refactor(orchestrate_v2): migrate StateDB to aiosqlite, add full schema

S2.title: ntfy outbox + batching + verbosity
S2.commit_message: feat(orchestrate_v2): replace osascript with ntfy outbox, add batching and verbosity

S3.title: Heartbeats + network detection + per-segment timeout
S3.commit_message: feat(orchestrate_v2): add heartbeats, stall detection, network check, per-segment timeout

S4.title: Mobile-first dashboard + UX features
S4.commit_message: feat(orchestrate_v2): mobile-first dashboard with search, keyboard nav, ETA, and notifications log

S5.title: Operator control API + dashboard buttons + CLI flags
S5.commit_message: feat(orchestrate_v2): operator control API with skip/retry/kill, dashboard buttons, CLI flags
